title: Combat sensor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Baodurcombatsensor.png|thumb|right|150px|[[Bao-Dur]] sporting a Combat sensor.]]
A sophisticated visor that was used during the [[Old Sith Wars]], the '''combat sensor''' was a modified version of the [[Spacer's sensor]] which employed targeting software that had prediction algorithms to direct the user's gaze in combat, increasing efficiency during battle. However, due to their construction, [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] were unable to use these tools.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
